findings.text: Bank statement covers 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 for account holder Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra.
Total outgoings £19,057.59 and total deposits £19,057.88 over the statement period.
Extracted transactions from 13-27 April 2026 include Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing, M&S, Greggs, Klarna, and personal transfers.
Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025-Apr 2026 is incomplete.

proposed_artifacts.content: Full transaction list extracted from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025-28/04/2026. Includes all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances. Note: OCR confidence 0.85; verify amounts and descriptions against original PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: Full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the full transaction history from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026. Ensure all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances are captured. Verify OCR accuracy against the original PDF.
proposed_tasks.title: Complete OCR extraction of all transactions from NAP-SRC-0012

redaction_flags.text: Transaction descriptions include merchant names (e.g., Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing) that may be personal or sensitive.
Personal transfers and running balances may reveal private financial information.
Account holder name and account details may require redaction before sharing.

risk_flags.text: Incomplete extraction may miss key transactions relevant to hardship or arrears analysis.
OCR errors in amounts or descriptions could affect financial calculations.
Personal transaction details (e.g., Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing) may raise privacy/redaction concerns.

summary: Extracted partial transaction history from Monzo bank statement NAP-SRC-0012 (01/09/2025-28/04/2026). The available extracted text covers only 13-27 April 2026; the full statement is ~27k tokens but only ~6k chars were excerpted. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the complete transaction history.

uncertainties.text: The extracted text covers only 13-27 April 2026; the full statement period (Sep 2025-Apr 2026) is not represented.
OCR confidence is 0.85; amounts and descriptions may contain errors.
The account holder name was not explicitly confirmed in the excerpt; inferred from prior context.
